name: canary
tagline: Monitors live applications post-deployment for errors, performance regressions, and visual anomalies using a browse daemon.
verdict: This skill provides robust post-deployment canary monitoring, including baseline comparisons, continuous checks, and detailed alerting. It has clear instructions, handles various scenarios like missing baselines and user interaction for page discovery, and includes comprehensive telemetry and context recovery. The skill is well-structured and provides clear

highlights.summary: Telemetry data is logged to a local file, which is then potentially uploaded by a separate telemetry-log binary. This is gated by a user setting.
Downloads bun install script and executes it via bash in the same breath, without user review.
Instructs the agent to read and follow instructions from a dynamically determined skill file for an upgrade flow.
